summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fase 1A Configuration Foundation. All backend APIs (23/23 tests) and frontend UI interactions passed successfully. Settings, Payment Terms, and Approval Rules CRUD operations are fully functional with proper PKP/non-PKP logic, tax calculation, and approval evaluation.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/settings - returns global settings (tax, finance, sales, inventory)
Backend: GET /api/settings/effective?entity_id - PKP logic works correctly (ent_ksc=PKP true, ent_kanda=non-PKP false)
Backend: PUT /api/settings - update and restore settings (ppn_rate 11→12→11)
Backend: GET /api/settings/compute-tax - tax calculation correct (ent_ksc: 1M→1.11M with 11% PPN, ent_kanda: 1M→1M no PPN)
Backend: GET /api/settings/evaluate-approval - approval rules evaluation (250M→admin, 10M→no approval, 100M→manager)
Backend: GET /api/payment-terms - returns 6 default terms (CASH, NET7, NET14, NET30, DP50, INST3)
Backend: POST /api/payment-terms - create new term successfully
Backend: POST /api/payment-terms duplicate code - returns 409 Conflict
Backend: PATCH /api/payment-terms/{id} - update term (active=false)
Backend: DELETE /api/payment-terms/{id} - soft delete (active=false)
Backend: GET /api/approval-rules - returns 7 default rules (3 sales_order, 2 discount, 2 purchase_order)
Backend: POST /api/approval-rules - create new rule successfully
Backend: PATCH /api/approval-rules/{id} - update rule (required_role)
Backend: DELETE /api/approval-rules/{id} - hard delete rule
Frontend: Login as admin successful
Frontend: Navigate to Admin → Settings tab
Frontend: Settings panel loads with 3 subtabs (Umum, Term Pembayaran, Matriks Approval)
Frontend: Umum subtab - view and update PPN rate (11→12), toggle e-Faktur, save settings
Frontend: Umum subtab - flash message 'Pengaturan tersimpan' appears after save
Frontend: Umum subtab - settings persist after page refresh
Frontend: Term Pembayaran subtab - view 6+ payment terms in table
Frontend: Term Pembayaran subtab - add new term (TEST99) successfully
Frontend: Term Pembayaran subtab - toggle term status (Aktif/Nonaktif)
Frontend: Matriks Approval subtab - view approval rules grouped by doc_type
Frontend: Matriks Approval subtab - add new approval rule (transfer, 0-100M, manager)
Frontend: Matriks Approval subtab - delete rule with confirm dialog
